title: Hamaker Extended tool
description: This web GUI tool calculates the Hamaker constant of two different types of Nanoparticles in dispersion medium using the NOVAMFF (i.e., a FF for the accurate prediction of Hamaker constants). The NP's chemical formulas and the chemical formula of the dispersion medium as well astheir densities are needed as input by the user
creator: https://ror.org/03wwn0z54
